question.label: Questioning cadence
question.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?
question.description: Surfaces the pattern behind low early alignment and whether it is habit, context, or caution.

answer: I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.

assessment.note: He names missing explicit expectations as the reason he holds back, which is a strong clarity gap and a mild growth constraint.

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.
I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
